worksheetTemplates.title: Worksheet Templates
worksheetTemplates.emptyRow: Using the default blank worksheet — set up a template.

mode.label: Template Mode
mode.editingMaster: Editing the {subject} master — changes apply to every new {subject} worksheet, not to a lesson.

profile.classesSaveError: Couldn’t save your class selection. Please try again.

modal.title: Permissions · {name}
modal.intro: Access is granted per (centre × subject) space. Saving sets exactly the selected pairs at the chosen role and removes any de-selected ones.

coordinator.title: Members & roles
coordinator.emptyMembers: No teachers have joined your subject yet.

error.title: Couldn't load members
error.body: Something went wrong reaching the server. Your changes are safe.

modal.title: Manage {name}
modal.removeHint: Removing a teacher takes them out of this subject across every centre. They keep their account and can be re-added later.
modal.removeError: Couldn’t remove this member. Please try again.

coordinator.footnote: To add a teacher who isn’t here yet, ask them to sign in and complete onboarding for this subject, or have an admin assign them. Coordinators can’t browse the full people directory.

subjects.title: Subjects
subjects.autoCodeHint: A matching curriculum code is assigned automatically.
subjects.empty: No subjects yet. Create the first one above.
subjects.blocked: {count, plural, one {# class} other {# classes}} still reference this subject. Reassign or archive those classes first.
subjects.archiveConfirm: This subject will be hidden from planning. You can restore it at any time.

curriculum.title: Curriculum
curriculum.publishConfirm: Publish a NEW curriculum version for "{subject}" from this workbook? It becomes the active version; existing lesson plans stay pinned to their current version. This cannot be undone from here.

reviewModal.title: Unresolved — {subject}
reviewModal.subtitle: {count} active lessons with no daily outcome. Benign structural rows; nothing to fix.

curriculum.errorReach: Couldn't reach the curriculum source. Last good sync was {ago}.

timeAgo.hours: {count, plural, one {# hr ago} other {# hrs ago}}
timeAgo.days: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

guide.noGuide: No guide uploaded — using the built-in default.

users.title: Users
users.lastAdminTooltip: This is the last active admin. Promote another admin before removing or deactivating this one.

empty.title: No users match “{query}”
empty.body: Try a different search or clear the filters.

error.title: Couldn't load users
error.body: Something went wrong reaching the server. Your changes are safe.

promoteDialog.title: Make {name} an admin?
promoteDialog.body: Admins can manage every centre, subject, class, and user across the whole organisation — including promoting or deactivating other admins.

deactivateDialog.title: Deactivate {name}?
deactivateDialog.warning: {name} loses access immediately and is signed out on every device.
deactivateDialog.body: This is reversible. Reactivating restores their access and all subject spaces exactly as they are now — nothing is deleted.

users.noSpaces: No subject spaces are set up yet.
users.noSchools: No centres are set up yet.
users.noSubjects: No subjects are set up yet.
users.orgWideNote: Manages every centre, subject, class, and user.
users.lastAdminNote: Last active admin — promote another admin before removing this one.
users.lastAdminRoleNote: Last active admin — promote another admin before changing this role.
users.selfDeactivateNote: You can’t deactivate your own account.

pending.title: Pending coordinator approvals
pending.subject: Coordinator · {subject}
pending.error: Couldn’t update the request. Please try again.

aiGuide.title: AI resource guide
aiGuide.successMessage: New guide version saved. It is now active for all resource generation.

smarttGuide.title: SMARTT objective guide
smarttGuide.successMessage: New guide version saved. It is now active for all objective checks.
